reasoning: This animation sequence depicts the careful handling of a yen banknote.  The robot will mime holding the note with both hands, emphasizing the value and delicacy of the currency.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting a sense of care and respect for the money.  I'll use the robot's arm structure to create a gentle, precise motion. In the first frame, both arms start in a neutral position. In the second frame, both arms move up and slightly forward, as if approaching the note. In the third frame, the hands are positioned as if gently holding the banknote, palms facing each other. In the fourth frame, the arms move slightly to the side, as if presenting the note. In the fifth frame, the arms return to a neutral position.
